---
title: "Tags"
---

```{=html}
<p>Browse all tags used across M@TE models. Click a tag to see related models.</p>

<h2>Research Tags</h2>
<div class="tag-cloud">
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/anisotropy.html">anisotropy <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/benchmark.html">benchmark <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/emplacement.html">emplacement <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/granulites.html">granulites <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/ice-sheet.html">ice-sheet <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/mechanical.html">mechanical <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/melt.html">melt <small>(1)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/stokes.html">Stokes <small>(1)</small></a>
</div>

<h2>Compute Tags</h2>
<div class="tag-cloud">
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/finite-element.html">Finite-Element <small>(2)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/particle-in-cell.html">Particle-in-cell <small>(2)</small></a>
  <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/python.html">Python <small>(2)</small></a>
</div>


```
